subject: Science
question: Define photosynthesis and state where in the plant cell it occurs.
answer_text: Photosynthesis is the process by which green plants make their own food using sunlight, carbon dioxide and water. It happens in the chloroplasts which contain chlorophyll.

criteria.name: Definition
criteria.description: Correctly defines photosynthesis (light, CO2, water -> food).

note: Strong, complete answer with a teacher-supplied rubric.

subject: English
question: Write a short paragraph (3-4 sentences) about your favourite festival and why you like it.
answer_text: My favourite festival is Diwali. We clean the house and make rangoli. At night we light diyas and burst crackers with family. I like it because everyone is happy and we get sweets.

subject: Science
question: Explain why we feel cold when we step out of a swimming pool.
answer_text: Because water is cold and the wind blows on us so we feel cold outside.
note: Deliberately weak/incomplete: misses evaporation causing cooling.

question: State Newton's first law of motion with an example.
answer_text: The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell and it produces energy for the body.
